---
title: "My Santa Barbara Favorites"
---

**Guide to my favorite places in SB**
(interactive map with different colors for restaurants/food, hikes, coffee spots. when you tap on one it'll open to photos, what I order and how long it takes!)

Going to include: 

- Food
- Breakfast restaurants, dinners, cute places to check out 
- Hikes 
- Hikes I have done in SB 
- Coffee Shops 
- My favorite study spots!
